name: codex
compensates_weakness: confidently wrong — does not flag its own uncertainty

dials.spec: outcome-first (goal, success criteria, evidence rules, output shape) — not rigid step-by-step
dials.evidence: every claim source-linked; it won't self-flag, so the gate does

distribution: Codex has no PreToolUse hook — enforced at worktree-accept (harness/adapters/codex/accept-gate.sh)
